title: Antiquax Wax Polish 500ml
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Time-Tested Formulation: Antiquax Original Wax Polish features a proven formula that has stood the test of time, enhancing the natural beauty of your wood furniture with a lasting, lustrous finish

Superior Protection: Our wax polish not only adds a brilliant shine but also forms a protective barrier, safeguarding your furniture from dust, stains, and everyday wear; preserve the elegance of your pieces effortlessly

Effortless Application: Experience the ease of application with our user-friendly wax polish; simply apply, buff, and watch your furniture come to life; aDD TO BASKETnow for a touch of sophistication in your furniture care routine

Versatile Use: Ideal for all wood surfaces, including antique furniture and modern pieces; this wax polish is a must-have for enthusiasts and homeowners seeking to maintain and revive the timeless allure of their wooden items
Lasting Radiance: Enjoy the enduring radiance of Antiquax; our wax polish leaves a long-lasting, glossy finish that resists fingerprints and smudges, keeping your furniture looking impeccable
description: From the manufacturer About us Antiquax is a renowned brand in the restoration and polishing industry, founded by Mr. Elliott in the early 1900s. The company's products are widely used in various applications, including wood, metal, marble, and floors. Antiquax is trusted by professionals and enthusiasts alike, with its products being used in large stately homes and museums worldwide. The brand's flagship product, Antiquax Original Wax Polish, is a blend of fine beeswax and carnauba wax, designed to penetrate and nourish wood surfaces. It enhances the grain and patina of the wood while providing a lasting sheen, resisting dust and fingerprinting. This product is suitable for all fine natural woods and antique furniture. Antiquax's dedication to quality and craftsmanship has made it a preferred choice for restoring and maintaining various surfaces, showcasing the brand's commitment to excellence in the restoration and polishing industry
